routes.name: route-to-firewall
routes.description: Force all outbound traffic through Azure Firewall private IP

notes.nextHopType: VirtualAppliance is used for Azure Firewall (not VirtualNetworkGateway)
notes.bgpPropagation: Disabled to prevent BGP routes from overriding the custom UDR
notes.effect: All traffic leaving WorkloadSubnet (10.0.2.0/24) is inspected by fw-lab at 10.0.1.4
